name: Separating Age-Related vs Work Hearing Loss

mainEntity.name: How does age-related hearing loss affect my workplace claim in Farmington?
mainEntity.text: How does age-related hearing loss affect my workplace claim in Farmington?

acceptedAnswer.text: Deducted if proven by pre-employment baselines; Utah employers liable only for occupational portion, requiring expert apportionment.

suggestedAnswer.text: Presbycusis subtracted via audiometric comparison. Farmington seniors face scrutiny; strong baselines preserve full work-loss awards. Medical disputes common—use otologists. Legal strategy maximizes recoverable share.[4]

description: Deducted if proven by pre-employment baselines; Utah employers liable only for occupational portion, requiring expert apportionment.
